title: Enter: Naruto Uzumaki!
description: Welcome to the Village Hidden in the Leaves, where deadly serious Ninja roam the landscape and the seriously mischievous Naruto Uzumaki causes trouble everywhere he goes. But when he steals the ancient scroll of sealing, he unleashes a rare power rarely seen in a 12-year-old boy!

title: My Name is Konohamaru!
description: Naruto finally graduates from the Ninja Academy and claims to know it all. Well, at least that what he tells Konohamaru, the Village elder's pint-size grandson. Much to the dismay of Ebisu, Konohamaru's teacher and mentor, Naruto teaches him the hormonally lethal "Sexy Jutsu!"

title: Sasuke and Sakura: Friends or Foes?
description: Naruto is preparing himself for the Genin orientation. It's all a happy story until Sensei picks a team for all the ninjas. Naruto was teamed up with his crush, Sakura, and his worst enemy, Sasuke. Can Naruto learn to work together with two people whom despise him?

title: Pass or Fail: Survival Test
description: Naruto finally meets his new sensei. His name is Kakashi Hatake. He tells the group that before they could become Genin, they will have to pass his survival test. The problem is, the test has a 66% chance of failure, and if they fail they'll be sent back to the academy. To make matters even worse, one of them will fail no matter what. Can the three pass Kakashi's test?

title: You Failed! Kakashi's Final Decision
description: Time is running out for Naruto and his group. With Sasuke the only one left, he tries to succeed where the others failed. Will they be able to get the bells before time runs out?

title: A Dangerous Mission! Journey to the Land of Waves!
description: Tired of doing lame missions, Naruto asks the Hokage to give them something challenging. The Hokage caves and gives them a C-rank mission. They will be bodyguards for a bridge builder. It appears to be a simple mission, until the group is attacked by something more than common thugs...other ninja!

title: The Assassin of the Mist!
description: Team Kakashi and Tazuna are on their way to his home. On the way there they run across a ninja named, Zabuza Momochi. Is the Sharingan enough to defeat this new enemy, or is team Kakashi's first mission over before its even begun?

title: The Oath of Pain
description: With Kakashi captured, Naruto, Sasuke and Sakura must defend against Zabuza's attacks. Naruto realizes that working together with Sasuke may be the only way to save Kakashi. Will the combined effort of the two be enough to free Kakashi and defeat Zabuza?

title: Kakashi: Sharingan Warrior
description: With Kakashi free, the fight between him and Zabuza resumes. Kakashi decides to show Zabuza what the Sharingan is really capable of. Can Kakashi's Sharingan defeat Zabuza? And who is the mysterious person watching the fight?

title: The Forest of Chakra
description: With Zabuza gone things are now settling and Tazuna can go and build the bridge without fear. Or so everyone thinks. Kakashi believes something is wrong with Zabuza's death and teaches Naruto, Sakura, and Sasuke a way to train so they could better use their chakra. Is Zabuza really dead?

title: The Land Where a Hero Once Lived
description: While Naruto and Sasuke train, Sakura watches over Tazuna. During a nice dinner, Sakura notices a man's face torn from a picture. The man's name was Kaiza, and he was what the country called...a "hero". What happened to cause Inari so much pain?

title: Battle on the Bridge! Zabuza Returns!!
description: Naruto has a dangerous encounter with Haku in the forest, but is Haku there to cause trouble? Naruto and Sasuke better complete their training, as Zabuza is alive and has returned for round 2. Will Kakashi, Sasuke, and Sakura be able to defeat the Demon of the Mist? And, can Naruto arrive in time to help out?

title: Haku's Secret Jutsu: Crystal Ice Mirrors
description: Round two with Zabuza has started, but this time… Zabuza has Haku fighting along side him. Haku and Sasuke go at it with Sasuke falling behind until he manages to get a kick in. Meanwhile Naruto deals with some of Gato's henchmen. Back at the bridge Haku uses his secret jutsu, Demonic Ice Mirrors. What does this jutsu hold in store for Sasuke? Will Naruto make it to the bridge in time and save Tsunami and Inari as well?

title: The Number One Hyperactive, Knucklehead Ninja Joins the Fight!!
description: Naruto finally joins the battle on the bridge. But when Naruto stupidly gets caught in the middle of Haku's jutsu as well, he and Sasuke must work together to escape. Kakashi is unable to help them, as he must deal with Zabuza to protect Sakura and Tazuna. How will the two escape from the ice mirrors without any help?

title: Zero Visibility: The Sharingan Shatters
description: Naruto and Sasuke continue to fight Haku and are getting beaten bad. After having Naruto try and escape a few times, Sasuke begins to see a pattern. Meanwhile, outside Kakashi and Zabuza begin their fight. Can Naruto and Sasuke escape from Haku's jutsu? What plan does Zabuza have to defeat the Sharingan?

title: The Broken Seal
description: Naruto and Sasuke continue their rigorous battle against Haku. When Haku targets a vulnerable Naruto, Sasuke risks everything to save him. Seeing his friend lie before him, a powerful force awakens inside Naruto. Has Kyubi been set free. If so, can anyone stop him?

title: White Past: Hidden Ambition
description: Naruto takes out his rage on Haku, who doesn't stand a chance. However, Naruto realises that Haku is the boy he met back at the forest. Haku tells Naruto the story of his past and asks for Naruto to do him one favour..... Will Naruto do the one thing he could never do just as Haku wishes?

title: The Weapons Known as Shinobi
description: Kakashi prepares to stop Zabuza once and for all, but Haku has other plans. Zabuza's employer shows up and he's decided to take matters into his own hands...

title: The Demon in the Snow
description: Zabuza is no longer Kakashi's enemy, and thanks to a little speech by Naruto about how ninja are, Zabuza takes on Gato's men single handedly. The Demon of the Hidden Mist takes his vengeance on Gato and all of those dumb enough to follow him, and apologizes to Haku for what he did to the kind little boy. After the group takes care of the rest of Gato's men, Zabuza asks Kakashi one final request, to see Haku one final time. This is Zabuza's requiem.

title: A New Chapter Begins: The Chunin Exam!
description: With their latest mission complete, it's time once again for the group to go back to mediocre missions. After all are done, Konohamaru and his friends pay a visit to Naruto. All which result in being chased by Sakura. Everyone is soon over though, as two mysterious ninja block their way, and one of them isn't too happy with Konohamaru. Sasuke arrives to save the day, but the leader of the group shows up, with stealth skills that surprise even Sasuke. Meanwhile, the Third Hokage announces that it's time once again for the Chuunin selection exams.

title: Identify Yourself: Powerful New Rivals
description: After the three ninjas take their leave, Sasuke realizes he has a powerful rival out there. The next day, Kakashi announces that he has recommended all of them for the Chuunin Exams. While Naruto and Sasuke are pleased, Sakura is afraid of letting everyone down. Also, someone decides they aren't ready and decides to test their abilities.

title: Chunin Challenge: Rock Lee vs. Sasuke!
description: Rock Lee challenges Sasuke to a one-on-one fight. Naruto grows angry and attacks him, only to be beaten in one attack. Sasuke realizes the challenge and eagerly accepts. But will Sasuke be defeated just as easily by this mysterious ninja? Sasuke's only advantage seems to be his Sharingan, but what happens when not even that will work?

title: Genin Takedown! All Nine Rookies Face Off!
description: A reunion of all the rookies isn't a very happy one, as all of them prepare to take the Chuunin Exam. With so many rivals around, Naruto's team will need help from a fellow ninja named Kabuto to know what they're up against. Will the group be able to last through the exam?

title: Start Your Engines: The Chunin Exam Begins!
description: The first test of the Chuunin Exam is just that, a written test. When Ibiki issues a strict set of rules, Naruto fails to realize that the objective of the test is to cheat without getting caught. Can Naruto realize the truth before time runs out? And what about the tenth question?

title: The Tenth Question: All or Nothing!
description: As time ticks away, Naruto's only hope of passing the test lies in the final question. However, there is a requirement to answering the final question. If you choose not to answer it, you fail the test and can try again next time. But, if you choose to answer it and get it wrong, you can never take the test again and must stay a Genin forever! What will Naruto's choice be?

title: Special Report: Live from the Forest of Death!
description: Before the second exam can begin, Konohamaru and his friends pull the members of Team 7 aside for interviews, where they retell the storyline to this point.

title: The Chunin Exam Stage 2: The Forest of Death
description: The second exam is about to begin, and every ninja must sign a form so that their team can get either the Heaven or Earth Scroll. The goal is to get one of each scroll and make it to the tower in five days. The groups get their scrolls and the exam begins. Naruto is ambushed by a ninja who poses as him. This ninja doesn't fool Sasuke, who immediately figures it out. Meanwhile, a new foe seeks them out, but who is this foe?

title: Eat or be Eaten: Panic in the Forest
description: To prevent further problems, Sasuke thinks up a password to determine friend from foe, but will it be that simple? Meanwhile Naruto has his hands full with a giant snake. Can he handle this on his own and what about Sasuke and Sakura, can they survive the ordeal?

title: Naruto's Counterattack: Never Give In!
description: Sasuke is about to give up and give their scroll to the enemy, when Naruto stops him and accuses him of being a fake. Naruto then turns his attention to the Grass Ninja.... The battle is intense and when the Grass Ninja appears to get the upper hand, can Sasuke muster up the courage to fight?

title: The Sharingan Revived: Dragon-Flame Jutsu!
description: Sasuke is still stuck in his trance and even Sakura's pleas can't get him back to normal. Meanwhile, Anko searches for the grass ninja fake. When the team appear to get the upper hand the question begs to be asked. Are the ninja truly defeated, or is there more to them than meets the eye?

title: Bushy Brow's Pledge: Undying Love and Protection!
description: Since Sakura was the only one who did not get injured in the previous battle she must watch over and protect her teammates. Unknown to her though, there are enemies watching from the trees.... They attack, but a friend arrives to help. Will it be enough?

title: Sakura Blossoms!
description: Lee in his weakened state is having trouble defeating Dosu. Sakura realises everyone has been protecting her until now and that its her time to protect them! Can Sakura succeed where even Lee failed?

title: Battle Formation: Ino-Shika-Cho!
description: With Sakura defeated and facing certain death, more reinforcements step into the fray. However, they sense an even bigger level of power, and its not coming from the sound trio! Meanwhile Sasuke wakes up with an ominous dark aura surrounding him and the mysterious seal spreading over his body. He has but one goal....make his enemies pay!

title: Akamaru Trembles: Gaara's Cruel Strength!
description: Kiba, Shino, and Hinata decide to try and eliminate their opponents by taking more scrolls. They arrive upon a battlefield where three Rain ninjas are battling Gaara, Kankuro, and Temari. They remain hidden and observe the battle, thinking one of the Rain ninjas is a dangerous foe. After realizing Gaara's amazing abilities, they discover who is the really the dangerous one, and will be lucky if they can sneak away with their lives!

title: The Scroll's Secret: No Peeking Allowed
description: Team Kakashi still has only one scroll and there is only a day left before the test ends. Naruto decides they need to make a fake scroll and goes to open their Earth scroll, when Kabuto shows up and stops him, explaining that the scroll will knock them out until after the exam ends. He then tells them he will help them find the scroll they need. They seem to be the ones on the hunt, but what happens when they fall into a trap set by the enemy?

title: Clone vs. Clone: Mine are Better than Yours!
description: The battle of kings has begun as Orochimaru has summoned some unexpected help. How can the Third Hokage handle this uncomfortable situation? Meanwhile, Sasuke finally catches up with Kakurou, Gaara and Temari…

title: Surviving the Cut! The Rookie Nine Together Again!
description: While Naruto and Sakura continue to catch up to Sasuke, Temari trys to stall Sasuke long enough for Kankuro to get Gaara to safety, but Sasuke doesn't have time to waste on her! Meanwhile, The Third Hokage continues his battle with Orochimaru and is ready to use a move that not even he knows...

title: Narrowing the Field: Sudden Death Elimination!
description: An unlikely ally appears to help Sasuke and allows him to continue to pursue Gaara. Meanwhile, the Hokage prepares to make the ultimate sacrifice to rid his village of Orochimaru!

title: Bushy Brow's Jealousy: Lions Barrage Unleashed!
description: While Shino and Kankuro fight the match they should've fought back during the Chuunin Exam, Naruto, Sakura, and Pakkun slowly catch up to Sasuke. Meanwhile, Sasuke has finally caught up with Gaara and Temari, but is he ready to face true horror when Gaara reveals his demon form?

title: Kakashi and Orochimaru: Face-to-Face!
description: Sasuke struggles to keep up with Gaara's monstrous capacity. Only able to use Chidori twice in normal circumstances, Sasuke remembers that tragic day when his family died and realises he must risk the use of Chidori beyond his limit if he is to defeat Gaara. That is, if he can…

title: Kunoichi Rumble: The Rivals Get Serious!
description: As Sasuke is about to be defeated, Naruto and Sakura show up to save him. With this Gaara begins to have flashbacks of his childhood. What happened in Gaara's past to make him experience so much suffering?

title: The Ultimate Battle: Cha!
description: Gaara continues to talk about his past. When Gaara states that Naruto can't become stronger when he fights for everyone else, Naruto recalls that if he didn't meet his friends, he would be the same as Gaara. Realizing that he has to protect his friends, Naruto overcomes his fear and decides to take on Gaara.

title: Killer Kunoichi and a Shaky Shikamaru
description: Naruto and Gaara continue their fight.  Naruto begins to get an advantage, and Gaara transforms into the final form of Shukaku of the Sand. As he begins to put the squeeze on Naruto, Naruto summons Gamabunta Oyabun, and his comeback begins. Once again, Naruto begins to get an advantage, but Gaara casts the technique of fake sleep, releasing the full power of Shukaku. Now that the demon is free, what will Naruto do?

title: Akamaru Unleashed! Who's Top Dog Now?
description: Transformed into Kyubi, Naruto and Gamabunta prepare to stop Shukaku by waking Gaara up. Though they succeed, the battle is far from over as Gaara won't stop until Naruto is dead. Naruto and Gaara prepare for their final attacks. Meanwhile, Sarutobi continues trying to defeat Orochimaru. And even though Sarutobi isn't strong enough to kill Orochimaru, he does have enough strength to take away Orochimaru's most prized possession...the use of his arms!

title: Surprise Attack! Naruto's Secret Weapon!
description: As the war draws to a close, Gaara admits his defeat to Naruto, and Orochimaru is forced to retreat as Sarutobi took away his arms. Now, all of the Konoha shinobi gather together to pay their respects to the person whom they respected the most… Sarutobi, the Third Hokage.

title: Byakugan Battle: Hinata Grows Bold!
description: Two mysterious ninja infiltrate Konoha, and one of them bares the Sharingan. Just what are these two after? Why has Itachi Uchiha returned to Konoha?

title: A Failure Stands Tall!
description: Kakashi takes on Itachi, with both of them using the Sharingan. However, Kakashi soon realizes that he stands no chance against the legendary ninja. Itachi reveals that he has not come for his little brother, but instead he's come to do something else… abduct Naruto, and Kyubi as well!

title: Gaara vs. Rock Lee: The Power of Youth Explodes!
description: Jiraiya and Naruto begin their search for Tsunade, but are constantly sidetracked by Jiraiya's peeping and hitting on pretty girls. Jiraiya tells Naruto some stories about the 3rd and 4th Hokages. Meanwhile, Sasuke learns that his brother, Itachi, is after Naruto and goes to warn him.

title: Lee's Hidden Strength: Forbidden Secret Jutsu!
description:
Lee uses the banned technique Primary Lotus to attack Gaara.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Fifth Gate: A Splendid Ninja is Born
description:
Lee decides to use the forbidden move, Hidden Lotus, as a last resort.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Shadow in Darkness: Danger Approaches Sasuke
description:
In the final match of the preliminaries, Choji fights against Orochimaru`s minion Dosu. The preliminaries are finally over, and the Hokage reveals the third exam.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Ebisu Returns: Naruto's Toughest Training Yet!
description:
In preparation for the third exam that starts in a month, Naruto`s former mentor, Kakashi, chooses Ebisu to train the young ninja.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Long Time No See: Jiraiya Returns!
description:
Jiraiya, one of the legendary Three Ninja, suddenly appears before Ebisu and Naruto. Naruto gives Jiraiya the nickname, "Pervy Sage."
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Summoning Jutsu: Wisdom of the Toad Sage!
description:
The Sound Ninja Dosu appears before Gaara and intends on defeating Gaara. But Gaara beats him soundly. Stealthily watching them are a Jonin of the Sand Village and Kabuto!
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Feeling of Yearning, A Flower Full of Hope
description:
Naruto continues training under Jiraiya to master the "Summoning Jutsu" which enables him to call forth various living beasts. But he has a hard time controlling the Chakra of the Nine-Tailed Fox...
Source: crunchyroll

title: Live or Die: Risk it All to Win it All!
description:
It is three weeks since Naruto began training under Jiraiya. And Naruto has been on the brink of collapse many times.
Source: crunchyroll

title: He Flies! He Jumps! He Lurks! Chief Toad Appears!
description:
Naruto is finally able to draw out the Nine-Tail Chakra and utilize the "Summoning Jutsu." Gamabunta appears and does not believe that Naruto summoned him.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hospital Besieged: The Evil Hand Revealed!
description:
On the day of the test, Gaara disappears from the inn where the Sand Ninja are staying and goes to Hidden Leaf Hospital.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Final Rounds: Rush to the Battle Arena!
description:
The day of the Exam finally arrives. Naruto’s first opponent is Neji Hyuga.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Byakugan vs. Shadow Clone
description:
Finally, Chunin Exam starts with the eight Ninja who qualified in the preliminaries. But Sasuke is nowhere to be found.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Ultimate Defense: Zero Blind Spot!
description:
Naruto is unable to use his Shadow Clone Jutsu against Neji who can see chakra points!
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Failure's True Power
description:
Naruto and Neji’s battle continue with Neji showing enormous power.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hit it or Quit it: The Final Rounds Get Complicated!
description:
Defeated by Naruto, Neji is being taken to the hospital, when Neji’s uncle Hiashi appears.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Zero Motivation: The Guy with Cloud Envy!
description:
Sasuke’s match is postponed and suddenly, it is Shikamaru’s turn. He has shown no eagerness to fight, thinking that his is merely a secondary match…
Source: crunchyroll

title: Dancing Leaf, Squirming Sand
description:
In the Shikamaru and Temari’s match, Shikamaru who had the upper hand suddenly makes a surprising decision!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Bushy Brow's Jutsu: Sasuke Style!
description:
Sasuke and Gaara’a anticipated match begins. Gaara eerily talks to himself, as though addressing someone.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Late for the Show, But Ready to Go! The Ultimate Secret Technique is Born!
description:
Sauske`s speed and moves are identical to Lee’s Taijutsu. But Gaara is not an opponent who can be defeated with just Taijutsu.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Zero Hour! The Destruction of the Hidden Leaf Village Begins!
description:
During the match, someone has used Genjutsu to put everyone in the arena to sleep. The Sand Ninja led by Orochimaru have begun their plan to destroy the Hidden Leaf Village.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Village in Distress: A New A-Ranked Mission!
description:
The Sound and Sand Ninja, along with Orochimaru, begin their move to destroy Hidden Leaf Village. The arena has become a battleground.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Shirker's Call to Action: A Layabout No More!
description:
Along with Pakkun, Naruto, Sakura and Shikamaru are in hot pursuit of Sasuke. Pakkun senses nine of Orochimaru`s men coming after them.
Source: crunchyroll

title: An Unrivaled Match: Hokage Battle Royale!
description:
Orochimaru traps the Hokage inside a barrier and continue to battle.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Mistake from the Past: A Face Revealed!
description:
Sasuke finally catches up to Gaara, Temari, and Kankuro. Kankuro escapes with Gaara leaving Temari to face Sasuke.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Forbidden Secret Technique: Reaper Death Seal!
description:
The battle between the Hokage and Orochimaru rages on. Finally, the Hokage resorts to a Jutsu unknown to Orochimaru, the Sealing Jutsu known as “Reaper Death Seal.”
Source: crunchyroll

title: Astonishing Truth! Gaara's Identity Emerges!
description:
Shino appears as Sasuke and Kankuro battle. Leaving Shino to handle Kankuro, Sasuke goes after Gaara.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Sasuke's Decision: Pushed to the Edge!
description:
Half of Gaara’s body has transformed and Sasuke continues his battle against him.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Assassin of the Moonlit Night
description:
By the time Naruto and Sakura catch up, Sasuke has exhausted his strength and collapsed.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Light vs. Dark: The Two Faces of Gaara
description:
Naruto is helpless against Gara’s immense power. While Naruto declares that he fights for his comrades, Gaara says he fights for himself.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Naruto's Ninja Handbook
description:
Naruto is helpless against Gaara’s overpowering strength. However, after seeing Sasuke risking life and limb to save him and Sakura…
Source: crunchyroll

title: Beyond the Limit of Darkness and Light
description:
Naruto is helpless against Gaara’s overpowering strength. However, after seeing Sasuke risking life and limb to save him and Sakura…
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Third Hokage, Forever...
description:
With every ounce of their power, Gaara and Naruto continue to fight. Determined to protect Sakura, Naruto attacks Gaara again and again.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Return of the Morning Mist
description:
Orochimaru`s plan to destroy the Village Hidden in the Leaves is stopped. But the damage is extensive and work proceeds quickly to make repairs.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Eye to Eye: Sharingan vs. Sharingan!
description:
Kakashi arrives in the nick of time to help Asuma and Kurenai, and Itachi too enters the fray. The ultimate battle between two Sharingan users begins.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Jiraiya: Naruto's Potential Disaster!
description:
Jiraiya and Naruto are on a journey to find Tsunade, one of the legendary Sannin. Jiraiya`s purpose is both to protect Naruto from the clutches of the mysterious organization the Akatsuki and to train his apprentice.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Roar, Chidori! Brother vs. Brother!
description:
Intent on confronting Itachi, Sasuke rushes to the town where Naruto is staying. On the way, tragic memories of his past come flooding back.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hate Among the Uchihas: The Last of the Clan!
description:
Jiraiya saves Naruto from Kisame just in time. It turns out that Itachi and the Akatsuki organization are definitely after Naruto to obtain the power of the Nine-Tailed Fox.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A New Training Begins: I Will Be Strong!
description:
Deeply hurt mentally and physically, Sasuke is taken back to the Hidden Leaf Village by Guy. If only the medical specialist Tsunade were there...
Source: crunchyroll

title: Keep on Training: Pop Goes the Water Balloon!
description:
Naruto finally begins his training with Jiraiya. The technique Naruto will learn was the trademark of the Fourth Hokage, a technique which even a genius like him took three years to master.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Focal Point: The Mark of the Leaf
description:
Naruto manages to complete the first step of his training. But the next step, making a rubber ball explode with chakra, proves extremely difficult.
Source: crunchyroll

title: An Impossible Choice: The Pain Within Tsunade's Heart
description:
Orochimaru and Kabuto suddenly appear before Tsunade and Shizune who are out sightseeing. Orochimaru, injured by the Third Hokage`s Reaper Death Seal, seeks the former Sannin`s medical expertise.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Unforgivable! A Total Lack of Respect!
description:
In exchange for healing his arms, Orochimaru offers to bring back to life Tsunade`s younger brother Nawaki and Dan, her sweetheart.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Inheritence! The Necklace of Death!
description:
Naruto is incensed at the way Tsunade disrespects the position of Hokage and challenges her to a fight.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Dubious Offer! Tsunade's Choice!
description:
Naruto practices hard so he can win the necklace from Tsunade. Meanwhile, Tsunade is in a dilemma over Orochimaru`s offer.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Breakdown! The Deal is Off!
description:
Gripped by the desire to see Nawaki and Dan, Tsunade almost succumbs to Orochimaru`s tempting offer.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Attack! Fury of the Rasengan!
description:
Orochimaru and Kabuto use a summoning jutsu to call forth a giant snake. Still drugged and unable to fully use his chakra, Jiraiya summons little Gamakichi.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Fifth Hokage! A Life on the Line!
description:
Naruto`s ninja way is to never go back on his word. Naruto is seriously injured by Kabuto and hovers on the verge of death.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Deadlock! Sannin Showdown!
description:
Jiraiya, Tsunade and Orochimaru all release their summoning jutsu. And a fierce battle begins.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Kidnapped! Naruto's Hot Spring Adventure!
description:
Tsunade, Naruto, and the others start heading back to the Leaf Village where Tsunade will formally become the Fifth Hokage. At Tsunade`s urging, they stop at a town with hot springs.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Tsunade's Warning: Ninja No More!
description:
Naruto asks Tsunade to heal Sasuke and Lee before she is installed as the Hokage. After examining Lee, she tells him to find a path other than of that of a shinobi.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Will of Fire Still Burns!
description:
Lee hesitates when Tsunade asks him whether he will quit pursuing the path of a ninja or choose to undergo a risky surgery with only a fifty percent chance of success.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Sensei and Student: The Bond of the Shinobi
description:
After being advised by Tsunade to quit the path of the shinobi, Lee recalls his first meeting with his teacher Guy. Unable to master either ninjutsu or genjutsu, Lee has always been looked down upon by the others.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Gotta See! Gotta Know! Kakashi-Sensei's True Face!
description:
Naruto and his two squadmates have always wanted to see what Kakashi looks like under his mask. The three do whatever they can to reveal his whole face.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Mission: Help an Old Friend in the Land of Tea
description:
Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura are sent on a B-rank mission to the neighboring Land of Tea. They are to protect the runners in a race being held during the Todoroki Shrine`s ceremonial ritual held every four years.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Race is on! Trouble on the High Seas!
description:
The chief retainers think that Idate has made a farce of their great traditional festival. Jirocho believes that Idate has fled with some plan in mind.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Run Idate Run! Nagi Island Awaits!
description:
Naruto and his squad manage to catch up to Idate, only to find him hurt and unconscious with Aoi nearby.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Fierce Battle of Rolling Thunder!
description:
Despite interference from Aoi, Idate continues his run. Idate still trusts no one, and it`s revealed that during the Chunin Exams, Idate`s older brother was the proctor who posed the tenth question.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Last Leg: A Final Act of Desperation
description:
Boss Jirocho waits, confident that Idate will win. But Aoi, the ninja sent by the Wagarashi clan, stands in the way.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Battle Begins: Naruto vs. Sasuke
description:
Shikamaru is promoted to chunin, and he and his squadmates celebrate at a BBQ restaurant. In the hospital, Lee decides to undergo a dangerous surgery to repair his body so that he can remain a ninja.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Bitter Rivals and Broken Bonds
description:
Naruto and Sasuke release their ultimate weapons against each other, and just in time Kakashi arrives to stop the fight.
Source: crunchyroll

title: An Invitation from the Sound
description:
The Sound Ninja Four, Kidomaru, Sakon, Jirobo and Tayuya, suddenly appear before Sasuke. Sakura is concerned about the Curse Mark placed on Sasuke by Orochimaru...
Source: crunchyroll

title: Formation! The Sasuke Retrieval Squad
description:
Sakura`s pleas fall on deaf ears, and Sasuke leaves Hidden Leaf Village. When Tsunade learns of this, she summons Shikamaru to lead his first mission as a chunin.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Sound vs. Leaf
description:
The Sound Ninja Four race toward Orochimaru`s lair with Sasuke in hand. They`re discovered and challenged by the jonin Genma and Raido...
Source: crunchyroll

title: Squad Mutiny: Everything Falls Apart!
description:
Naruto and the others are trapped in Jirobo`s Earth Dome Prison. They try to pound their way out, but the walls regenerate each time.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Full Throttle Power! Choji, Ablaze!
description:
After they are freed from the Earth Dome Prison, Shikamaru and the others take off after the remaining Sound while Choji stays behind.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Good-bye Old Friend...! I'll Always Believe in You!
description:
After Choji takes the yellow pill it looks as if he may win the battle, until Jirobo transforms into Second State, giving him immense power.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Your Opponent Is Me!
description:
Assuming that the Leaf Squad could never get past Jirobo, the remaining Sound ninja don`t bother to lay traps along the way.
Source: crunchyroll

title: 360 Degrees of Vision: The Byakugan's Blind Spot
description:
Neji takes on Kidomaru while the others continue their pursuit of Sasuke and the remaining Sound ninja.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Losing is Not an Option!
description:
Kidomaru changes tactics and creates a bow and arrow to attack Neji`s blind spot.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Vessel Arrives Too Late
description:
Naruto, Shikamaru, Kiba and Akamaru are in hot pursuit of Sasuke and the Sound ninja. Naruto and Kiba are upset that they have been unable to catch up and decide to try a surprise attack at night.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Miscalculation: A New Enemy Appears!
description:
Akamaru sets explosives in the trees to trap Sakon. But an incensed Sakon turns the tables, and the explosives end up sending Kiba, Akamaru and Sakon off a cliff.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Roar and Howl! The Ultimate Tag Team
description:
Shikamaru is determined to stop Tayuya, but she uses her Summoning Jutsu to call forth three giants. Meanwhile, on the plains, the battle between Kimimaro and Naruto is about to begin.
Source: crunchyroll

title: To Each His Own Battle
description:
Ukon, who is able to infiltrate the bodies of others, enters Kiba`s body and tries to merge with his cells.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Fakeout: Shikamaru's Comeback!
description:
An injured Kiba and Akamaru barely escape from Sakon and Ukon. Naruto is locked in battle with Kimimaro...
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Leaf's Handsome Devil!
description:
Shikamaru succeeds in trapping Tayuya with his Shadow Possession Jutsu. But Tayuya moves to her Second State and fights back with enormous strength.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Beast Within
description:
With Rock Lee there to take on Kimimaro, Naruto is free to chase after Sasuke, who has awakened.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Sand Shinobi: Allies of the Leaf
description:
Shikamaru, Kiba and Lee are at the limits of their strength when Gaara, Temari and Kankuro appear to assist their Leaf allies.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Showdown: Gaara vs. Kimimaro!
description:
Kimimaro realizes that close combat is impossible against Gaara`s wall of sand, so he moves further away for a long-distance attack.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Vengeful Strike! The Bracken Dance
description:
Kimimaro succeeds in shattering Gaara`s protective sand shield and attacks Gaara. Naruto finally catches up to Sasuke...
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Cry on Deaf Ears
description:
With the Curse Mark covering half his body, Sasuke is no longer the Sasuke of old. Naruto charges at this new Sasuke who has turned his back on his closest comrades.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Brothers: Distance Among the Uchiha
description:
Naruto tries desperately to change Sasuke`s mind, but Sasuke is determined to go to Orochimaru. He tells Naruto that in order to surpass his brother, Itachi, power and hatred are necessary.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Father and Son, the Broken Crest
description:
Naruto is brought down by Sasuke`s Fire Style: Fireball Jutsu. It is a jutsu passed down through generations of the Uchiha family...
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Secrets of the Mangekyo Sharingan!
description:
Sasuke quietly watches as Naruto sinks deeper in the water. He recalls the past, when the Uchiha clan was cruelly slaughtered.
Source: crunchyroll

title: For a Friend
description:
Kakashi uses his Summoning Jutsu and sends ninja dogs to track Naruto and Sasuke. With his newfound strength, Sasuke is serious about bringing down Naruto...
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Plea From a Friend
description:
Naruto releases his Nine-Tail chakra and sends Sasuke flying. Sasuke counters with his Fire Style Jutsu, but Naruto extinguishes the flames easily.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The End of Tears
description:
Naruto`s Nine-Tail chakra seems to move with a will of its own as it counters Sasuke`s powerful attacks.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Promise That Could Not Be Kept
description:
The fierce battle with Sasuke leaves Naruto unconscious. Kakashi finally arrives at his side.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Deep Cover!? A Super S-Ranked Mission!
description:
Sakura tries to sneak out of the village to find Sasuke, but Naruto intercepts her.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Town of Outlaws, the Shadow of the Fuma Clan
description:
Naruto, Sakura and Jiraiya search for information in a town in the Land of Rice Paddies.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Pure Betrayal, and a Fleeting Plea!
description:
Naruto, Sakura and Sasame are attacked by Kamikiri, Jigumo and Kagero of the Fuma Clan.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Pure Terror! The House of Orochimaru
description:
Jiraiya uses his Summoning Jutsu to call out Gamakichi. With Gamakichi leading the way, the shinobi advance up winding stairways and through long tunnels.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Two Heartbeats: Kabuto's Trap
description:
Sakura is cornered by Orochimaru! Just as Kabuto is about to hurl his kunai at her, Naruto comes running in.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Sakura's Determination
description:
Naruto tries to shield Sakura from an attack and is wounded by Kamikiri. Naruto laughs off his injury and counters with his Shadow Clone Jutsu...
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Three Villains from the Maximum Security Prison
description:
Naruto gets upset when Jiraiya sets out on a sudden mission without him. Jiraiya tells him to undergo special training during his absence and hands him a scroll.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Tonton! I'm Counting on You!
description:
Shizune pursues Mizuki who has escaped from the Maximum Security Prison, but is overcome by him and the brothers Raijin and Fujin.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A New Squad! Two People and a Dog?!
description:
Raijin and Fujin possess superhuman strength, and Naruto is no match for them.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A New Formation: Ino-Shika-Cho!
description:
Shikamaru, Ino and Choji come to the rescue.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Orochimaru's Shadow
description:
Naruto discovers that Tsubaki is Mizuki`s fiancee. She has an idea of his whereabouts and asks the squad to take her with them.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Clash of Fate: You Can't Bring Me Down
description:
Naruto and Iruka are left in a daze by the power of Mizuki`s chakra. Naruto counters with a jutsu but is quickly rebuffed.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Search for the Rare Bikochu Beetle
description:
Kiba, Shino and Hinata have come up with an idea to use the Bikochu beetle to find Sasuke.
Source: crunchyroll

title: What's the Difference? Don't All Insects Look Alike?
description:
Squad 8 and Naruto arrive at the Bikochu`s habitat. They use a photograph to guide them in their search...
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Battle of Bugs: The Deceivers and the Deceived
description:
Hinata is kidnapped by Suzumebachi and others from the Kamizuru Clan.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Blaze Away Byakugan: This Is My Ninja Way
description:
Naruto, Kiba and Shino are pursued and find themselves cornered in the hive of a queen bee.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Funeral March for the Living
description:
While training in the Hidden Leaf Village, Naruto rescues three men from the rapids who have come to request a mission.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Lesson Learned: The Iron Fist of Love
description:
The Kurosuki gang captures Rokusuke, and Raiga tells him that he will hold a funeral for him!
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Enemy of the Byakugan
description:
Raiga and Ranmaru use their Hidden Mist jutsu to conceal themselves in Katabami Gold Mine, where even Neji`s Byakugan cannot detect them.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Dark Creeping Clouds
description:
The Kurosuki Family is dispersed, and peace returns to Katabami Gold Mine.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Raiga's Counterattack
description:
Raiga comes back to life, only to see Ranmaru lying deathly still on the ground.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Run! The Curry of Life
description:
Despite his injuries, Lee keeps on fighting desperately. But the tornado that envelopes Raiga`s attack takes the form of a dragon, and Lee is swallowed up by it.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Follow My Lead! The Great Survival Challenge
description:
Naruto is chosen to lead Konohamaru, Moegi and Udon in a survival training exercise. Their destination is the Stone Face of Warudakumi at the top of Mt. Takurami...
Source: crunchyroll

title: Bounty Hunter from the Wilderness
description:
Tsunade orders Naruto, Hinata, Kiba and Akamaru on a mission to capture the thief Gosunkugi.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hunt or Be Hunted?! Showdown at the O.K. Temple!
description:
Naruto and the others tend to an injured Sazanami. As Sazanami tells it, he had once been a swordsmith in a peaceful town and was framed for a murder committed by Gosunkugi.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Appearance of Strange Visitors
description:
While Guy and Lee are away, two impostors dressed like them sneak into Hidden Leaf Village.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Cursed Warrior
description:
The Land of Birds is in turmoil due to a specter known as the Cursed Warrior, which is believed to be the ghost of Lord Owashi, the previous feudal lord who died suddenly.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Tactician's Intent
description:
Moso, the late feudal lord`s counselor, and Komei, the chief strategist, are at odds with each other. Neji begins to think that the Cursed Warrior is part of a plot
Source: crunchyroll

title: Too Late for Help
description:
Komei is controlling the Cursed Warrior. Moso thwarts Komei`s ambitions. The Leaf team feels uneasy about his motives. Neji doesn`t want to get involved, but Naruto is defiant. Gamakichi and Gamatatsu is summoned to investigate...
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Death of Naruto
description:
Tenten and Neji have no choice but to listen to Kakashi. He senses that their being followed. Komei has been declared a criminal and is to be executed. The Cursed Warrior appears and snatches Komei away.
Source: crunchyroll

title: When Time Stands Still
description:
Sagi swears to punish Moso himself. Naruto is reminded of Sasuke when he sees Sagi. Neither words nor Naruto`s attempts to stop him can deter Sagi from his chosen path of revenge.
Source: crunchyroll

title: When Egrets Flap Their Wings
description:
At Moso`s mansion, a battle takes place between the Wandering Ninja and a Leaf Ninja. With Chishima`s help, Naruto is freed from Moso`s genjutsu. Moso then reveals his true form as the leader of the Wandering ninja, Hoki!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Mix It, Stretch It, Boil It Up! Burn, Copper Pot, Burn!
description:
Choji and Naruto is craving Ichiraku`s special ramen only to find out that they find the shop closed! Teuchi reveals that his daughter has been kidnapped by Ryonin, aka the Ninja Chefs, who is after his secret recipes!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Remembrance: The Lost Page
description:
The Demon of the Ocean is wreaking havoc in the Land of the Sea. Anko leads a team consisting with Naruto, Ino, and Shino. It turns out Anko has an unexpected history with the Land of the Sea.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Closed Door
description:
Unable to find Naruto, Anko meets with officials from the Land of the Sea. The ship carrying government funds that they were supposed to guard sets sail the next day!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Infiltration: The Set-Up!
description:
Unable to find Naruto, Anko meets with officials from the Land of the Sea. The ship carrying government funds that they were supposed to guard sets sail the next day!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Despair: A Fractured Heart
description:
Amachi and his gang begin their attack on the government ship. Naruto and the others escape from Demon Island, but the sight that greets them is the Land of the Sea fleet on the verge of annihilation.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Battle at Sea: The Power Unleashed!
description:
The Hidden Leaf ninja and Amachi battle it out at sea. With Naruto`s help, Amachi is defeated, but then a monster appears. Naruto summons Gamabunta in order to defeat the monster.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Impossible! Celebrity Ninja Art - Money Style Jutsu!
description:
Kunijiro visists Tsunade and decides to have Naruto guide his boy through one day in the life of a ninja!
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Treasure Hunt is On!
description:
Naruto, Kiba, and Hinata are searching for buried treasue at the request of Tsunade`s friend Agari Kaisen. Thinking it`s an easy task since they have a map, Tsunade threatens to send them back to the Academy if they fail.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Run, Dodge, Zigzag! Chase or Be Chased!
description:
After escaping from the cave, Naruto and the others chase after the Kedouin in order to put a halt to their plot, but the Village Hidden in the Leaves is already under attack.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Please, Mr. Postman!
description:
Naruto discovers Jiraiya is up to no good. Jiraiya claims to be busy getting his manuscript ready before his deadline. Impatient and irritated, Naruto writes his own manuscript for Jiraiya!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Encounter! The Boy with a Star's Name
description:
Hidden Leaf Village receives a request from the Village Hidden in the Stars to guard a star. The star is actually a meteorite that fell 200 years ago and is said to possess mysterious powers.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Remembered Lullaby
description:
Naruto and the others investigates the whereabouts of the stolen star. The team suspects that is an inside job because the ninja who took the star used the ninja art, Kujaku, from the Star Village.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hidden Jutsu: The Price of The Ninja Art: Kujaku
description:
Akahoshi, the masked ninja who kidnapped Sumaru, intends to use Sumaru to call out the mysterious ninja who stole the star.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hoshikage, The Buried Truth
description:
The masked ninja and Naruto fall into the depths of the Valley. While tending to Naruto`s wounds, the masked ninja tells him the reason for stealing the star.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Reunion, The Remaining time
description:
Natsuhi`s body is reacting to the effects of the star. She wields the star and desperately confronts Akahoshi, but Sumaru is taken hostage
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Star's Radiance
description:
Sumaru senses his mother`s death and Naruto is unable to stop an angry Sumaru from running off. To save Sumaru, Hokuto and Mizura stake their lives to reveal the truth behind the star training.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Kiba's Long Day!
description:
Akamaru is injured by a rival shinobi from another nation. The shinobi used a battle skill that spreads bacteria throughout the opponent`s body, infecting the vicitim`s mental faculties. This causes Akamaru to go into uncontrollable rampage!
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Legend from the Hidden Leaf: The Onbaa!
description:
A mysterious being attaches itself to Naruto, while he was training in the forest. Tsunade begins to wonder if it isn`t the legendary being known as the "Onbaa."
Source: crunchyroll

title: Laughing Shino
description:
Naruto and Shino are given a mission to provide security during the Kagetsu family funeral, but they soon realize that the real mission is to help the eldest son carry out the man`s unusual last will and testament!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Open for Business! The Leaf Moving Service
description:
A ominous black smoke appears over the Land of Greens, and all of sudden Choji and company are attacked by an unidentified Ninja!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Mystery of the Targeted Merchants
description:
While questioning Yurinoshin and Shun, the Hidden Leaf squad learns the truth about Shun`s true identity. She is Princess Haruna, the only daughter of the Feudal Lord of the Land of Greens!
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Limitless Supply of Ninja Tools
description:
Naruto and the others is attacked by Ruiga, the first evil ninja, who can draw water from the earth to use as weapons. Naruto soon discovers a way to reverse the odds of their battle!
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Byakugan Sees the Blind Spot
description:
Naruto is again attacked by the second evil ninja, Jiga. Jiga threatens Naruto`s life when Hinata rushes in to save Naruto, but Hinata resists the threats and begins to fight!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Forecast: Death! Cloudy with Chance of Sun
description:
Naruto and Haruna is confronted by Renga. Declaring that he has taken down others before them, he advances on Naruto, ordering him to hand over the princess!
Source: crunchyroll

title: Ino Screams! Chubby Paradise!
description:
The princess has gained weight due to nerves and wants Ino to pose as the princess in order to attend the first meeting with a prince she adores.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Viva Dojo Challenge! Youth Is All About Passion!
description:
Lee opens a dojo because he feels like he isn`t keeping up with his training. He is hoping challengers will come to his dojo to face him in battle.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Mysterious Curse of the Haunted Castle
description:
The first lady of the Land of Honey and her entourage have disappeared. Naruto, Kiba, and Hinata are sent on a mission and they discover an eerie castle looming in the middle of the road!
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Third Super-Beast!
description:
During Lee`s medical check-up, he discovers that there`s a lot of damage in his chakra network. Guy tries to cheer him up by taking Lee to the Academy training hall.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Hot-Blooded Confrontation: Student vs. Sensei
description:
Seeking revenge for his dead father, Genho, Yagura`s true identity and oldest sibling of the Ryudoin Brothers, confronts Guy using a unique Jutsu.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Crisis! The Hidden Leaf 11 Gather!
description:
The ANBU Black Ops suspect that Genno, a carpenter of Hidden Leaf Village, stole important blueprints of the village. Tsunade concludes that the one who used Genno plans to attack the Village and puts the village on Super S-Rank Alert!
Source: crunchyroll

title: The ANBU Gives Up? Naruto's Recollection
description:
ANBU Black Ops puts Naruto under retro-hypnosis to extract Genno`s motives. Without much success, Hidden Waterfall Village will be conducting maneuvers close to the village borders.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Missed Target
description:
While looking for the scattered blueprints, Naruto and his team realize that Genno`s actions are a diversion.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Powerful Helper
description:
Naruto and the others are shocked at the number of paper bombs placed throughout the village. While removing the seals, unexpected help arrives in the way of Homura and Koharu.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Multiple Traps! Countdown to Destruction
description:
Naruto confronts Genno, and Shikamaru realizes that all the traps are all diversions. Genno`s intention was to bury the village in a rockslide. Can the 11 ninja save the village from destruction?
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Top 5 Ninja Battles
description:
Naruto, Uzumaki, and Sakura take the microphones as hosts and then the program begins.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Kurenai's Decision, Squad 8 Left Behind
description:
Naruto encounters a young girl named Yakumo drawing a strange picture. The ANBU Black Ops and the Medical Corps arrive and whisk her away.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Yakumo's Sealed Ability
description:
Naruto has a dream about Yakumo wishing to become a ninja and Kurenai threatens to seal her power
Source: crunchyroll

title: Kurenai's Top-Secret Mission: The Promise With the Third Hokage
description:
The assailants are members of the Kurama Clan of Hidden Leaf Village. Naruto and company rush to the villa to protect Yakumo.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Genjutsu or Reality?
description:
Naruto goes to the hospital, when Unkai the ninja, who attacked them at the villa, appears. They search the village and come up with a theory based on the movement of Shino`s parasitic insects.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Supposed Sealed Ability
description:
Naruto finds that Yakumo has put Kurenai in a desperate situation, and the terrible secret of the Kurama villa reveals itself.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Weight of the Prized Artifact!
description:
Naruto and Kiba`s mission is to guard a prized tea bowl and meet the client Shinemon.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Enemy: Ninja Dropouts
description:
Gantetsu, a member of the Ninja Dropouts requests a guarded escort out of Hidden Leaf Village.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Bewildering Forest
description:
After evading the ambush by the Ninja Dropouts, Naruto, Gantetsu, and Todoroki find themselves in a forest maze that confuses a human`s sense of direction.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Memory of Flames
description:
The relationship between Gantetsu and Todoroki is revealed and tensions rise between the two.
Source: crunchyroll

title: To Each His Own Path
description:
After a heated battle, Naruto has the enemy cornered, but a boy is taken. This boy turns out to be Akio, Todoroki`s younger brother, who Todoroki thought was dead.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Vanished Memories
description:
Naruto comes upon an injured youth who has lost his memory. Tsunade is cautious about the boy`s presence, but Naruto is impressed by the boys kindness and insists on allowing the boy to stay.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Bringing Back Reality
description:
Tsunade believes that Menma has some connection to the Hidden Sound Village, and Naruto and the others head to the Land of Rice Paddies to check into Menma`s Memories.
Source: crunchyroll

title: A Past to Be Erased
description:
While in battle, Naruto finds out that Menma is a member of the gang of bandits that attacked their village. Being called a traitor by the leader of the gang, Menma reveals his greatest secret.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Targeted Shukaku
description:
Tsunade assigns Shikamaru a mission which is to solve the kidnapping case of the Sand Village ninja candidate Matsuri carried out by the Four Celestials. Leaf genin is called together once again.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Sand Alliance With The Leaf Shinobi
description:
Shino, Hinata, and Neji search out the enemy while Shikamaru waits for the right moment to attack. The true intentions of the Four Celestials is to capture Gaara.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Counterattack!
description:
Gaara`s opponents are setting up a trap and he is later caught in their secret jutsu, the Reverse Scale Position, and his sand is completely sealed.
Source: crunchyroll

title: The Ultimate Weapon Reborn
description:
Gaara and Naruto corner Hoko, the last of the Four Celestials, in a gully. They find out that their goal is to steal the Sand Spirit Shukaku`s chakra in order to gain the power to challenge the Five Great Nations.
Source: crunchyroll

title: Departure
description:
Gaara transforms into Shukaku the Sand Spirit, and wins an impressive victory. After the battle, some discover new paths to follow, and Naruto decides to become even stronger by going on a training journey with Jiraiya.
Source: crunchyroll
